title: gahnia juncea
intro: Gahnia juncea, also known as the Saw Sedge or Saw Grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Restionaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gahnia juncea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Gahnia juncea can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
